description_long: A classic hamburger sits on a white plate with a black rim, accompanied by a small serving of potato chips and two round potato bites. The hamburger features a lightly golden, sesame seed-topped bun, with crisp green lettuce, a thick beef patty, and a visible layer of creamy white sauce. Slices of tomato and possibly onion are tucked beneath the top bun, with some sauce and lettuce spilling out onto the plate. The patty appears juicy and well-cooked, with the toppings arranged in a slightly uneven but appetizing manner. The plate is clean and simple, highlighting the burger and its sides as the main focus. The overall presentation is inviting and typical of a casual dining or fast food setting.
description: A sesame seed hamburger with lettuce, tomato, sauce, and a beef patty, served on a white plate with chips and potato bites. The toppings are fresh and slightly overflowing, creating a hearty, appetizing look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hamburger with the top bun, lettuce, tomato, and sauce visible, along with two potato bites and chips on the left side of the plate.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the creamy sauce and lettuce spilling out, with the chips and potato bites more spread out on the right side.
description_view_2: The hamburger is seen with more lettuce and sauce visible at the base, and the chips are more prominent on the right side of the plate.
description_view_3: The back view shows the hamburger with the bun and patty, and the chips and potato bites are more clearly arranged along the plate's edge.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce and sauce are layered directly beneath the top bun, with tomato and possibly onion slices visible in some views. The toppings are unevenly distributed, with some spilling out onto the plate.
